require high-impact, state, migration, and implementation-path proof work to load governance plus verification even when read-only

invalidation_conditions: base commit, active target hash, candidate, patch, target list, or scope changes
targeted or full current-model regression is missing or fails
installed cache differs from the evaluated package
fresh-task evidence does not show exactly one codex-project-workflow runtime owner
protocol trigger, load-once, exact-command, approval, context-budget, or incomplete-measurement behavior regresses
approval refers to a different candidate, hash, runtime, result, or scope
